ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "test_setup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test setup used */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations about the test */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version number of the test data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test run was last updated */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., pending, in-progress, completed) */,
  "test_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_setup_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_setup_id") REFERENCES test_setups ("test_setup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_setups" (
  "test_setup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test setup */,
  "setup_name" TEXT /* Name of the test setup */,
  "setup_description" TEXT /* Description of the test setup */,
  "setup_config" TEXT /* Configuration details of the test setup in JSON format */,
  "setup_location" TEXT /* Location of the test setup */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test setup */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test setup was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test setup was last updated */,
  "setup_status" TEXT /* Status of the test setup (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_setup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "test_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data record */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the data belongs to */,
  "seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the data point */,
  "pwm" INTEGER /* Pulse Width Modulation (PWM) value */,
  "rpm" INTEGER /* Revolutions Per Minute (RPM) value */,
  "thrust" REAL /* Thrust value in grams */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage value in volts */,
  "current" REAL /* Current value in amps */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power consumption value in watts */,
  "gpwatt" REAL /* Grams per watt value */,
  "sample_rate" REAL /* Sample rate of the data in Hz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or observation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  "note_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the note (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notes_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the test data */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., log, configuration, data) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_files_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who calculated the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., max, min, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environment" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the environmental conditions belong to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test in percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure during the test in hPa */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude during the test in meters */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the environmental conditions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environmental conditions were recorded */,
  "env_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the environmental conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environment_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environment_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the configuration setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was set */,
  "config_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "test_setup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test setup the equipment belongs to */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., motor, propeller) */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "equipment_serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the equipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment was last updated */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_equipment_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_equipment_test_setup_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_setup_id") REFERENCES test_setups ("test_setup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test system */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the system belongs to */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the test system */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the test system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_systems_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_systems_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test software */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the software belongs to */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the test software */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the test software */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the software */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the software was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_software_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_software_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id")
)
